description: Control macOS system settings, apps, windows, audio, displays, screenshots, and Focus mode via MCP.
name: io.github.cyanheads/macos-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Default directory for screenshot files. Defaults to ~/Desktop when empty.
environmentVariables.name: MACOS_SCREENSHOT_DIR

environmentVariables.description: JSON object mapping layout names to displayplacer argument strings for apply_layout.
environmentVariables.name: MACOS_DISPLAY_LAYOUTS

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Authentication mode: none, jwt, or oauth.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Minimum log level for output: debug, info, notice, warning, error.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
